system.description:
By using this spell, the caster makes normal wood into magical wood that is as strong, heavy and resistant to fire as steel. Spells that affect metal or iron do not function on ironwood. Spells that affect wood do affect ironwood, although ironwood does not burn. Using this spell, the character can fashion wooden items that function as steel items, such as weapons and armors. These items are freely usable by druids. However, the wood to be transformed into ironwood must be shaped prior to the transformation. The spell can be used to alter 5 pounds of material per level of the caster.

The material component for this spell is iron dust.

# J
